files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 459e5b5..8b2ea59 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -2,28 +2,25 @@
 
 ## Strategy
-- Focus on Individual segments S1 and S3.
-- Aggressive quality push via Dev spend and targeted dev spend.
-- Pricing pivot: Plan A $14 (T3), Plan B $45 (T4).
-- Quotas increased (A=250, B=600) to resolve user frustration (Sam Rivera).
-- High investment in Market Research ($120k in Week 3) to reduce noise and find new segments.
-- Goal: Secure first 10-50 subscribers to validate the model.
+- S1 is converting well. Frustration with quotas addressed by increasing A to 400, B to 1200.
+- Quality push continuing but at lower burn ($1000/day Dev).
+- Targeted ads for S3 (Power Users) and discovered enterprise groups D_E02, D_E09.
+- Cash conservation is PRIORITY. Runway is ~9 weeks at current burn.
 
 ## Metrics Tracking
-- Week 1: 201 leads, 0 subs.
-- Week 2: 158 leads, 1 sub (Sam Rivera). 
-- Burn: ~$6.7k/day.
-- Cash (Day 14): $437,162.
-- Lead conversion is low. PMI 49.1 suggests cautious market.
+- Week 1: 0 subs.
+- Week 2: 1 sub.
+- Week 3: 16 subs (all S1). 
+- Cash: $104,102.
+- Burn: ~$1.9k/day (post-reduction).
+- Quality global_bonus: 0.0595.
 
 ## Knowledge & Lessons
-- `next-week` takes the rationale as the first argument.
-- Quotas matter! Users post about it.
-- S1 WTP might be as low as $21 (with -40% noise). Charging $14 is safer.
-- S3 is expensive to serve at Tier 4; need quality gains to move to Tier 3.
-- Enterprise leads haven't appeared; research D_E02 and D_E09.
+- Research is EXPENSIVE. Spent ~$450k on research in 3 weeks.
+- Quotas are a major pain point for S1 users. 
+- R&D Tier 1 started Day 0, still in progress at Day 21 (expected 12 days).
 
 ## To Do
-- Monitor S1/S3 conversion after price drop.
-- Check new groups discovered in Week 3.
-- Evaluate R&D Tier 1 progress (Day 30).
-- If cash drops below $150k without revenue growth, MUST cut Dev spend.
+- Watch for S3 conversion.
+- Watch for Enterprise leads from D_E02/D_E09.
+- If R&D finishes, evaluate starting Tier 2 if cash allows (unlikely soon).
+- Maintain burn at ~$1.9k/day until revenue picks up.
